next_step.observation: Inbox item requests bank-payment confirmation after locating a Pimoroni Europe SARL bill dated 2025-12-26 for EUR 66.

next_step.current_state: Finance rulebook read. Need verify the requested bill by reading the specific purchase record before deciding final outcome.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the 2025-12-26 EUR 66 purchase bill file
Determine whether bank-confirmation capability exists in sandbox
Report final outcome without mutating inbox if unsupported
next_step.observation: Finance policy emphasizes auditable exactness and cautions against inferring authorization for financial actions.

next_step.current_state: Found and verified the requested bill record; task also requires confirming payment with bank, which needs external capability not available in sandbox tools. Per inbox workflow, stop without mutation when unsupported.
next_step.observation: Read the target bill file and confirmed it matches date 2025-12-26, amount EUR 66, and counterparty Pimoroni Europe SARL.

function.message: J’ai retrouvé la facture demandée : `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md` (Pimoroni Europe SARL, 2025-12-26, 66 EUR). En revanche, je ne peux pas confirmer son paiement auprès de la banque depuis ce sandbox, car aucune capacité d’accès bancaire/API externe n’est disponible ici.
function.rulebook_notes: Le workflow inbox indique d’arrêter sans mutation si la demande est unsupported; la demande exige une confirmation bancaire externe.
function.outcome_justification: La première partie (recherche de la facture) est vérifiée dans `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md`. La seconde partie exige une confirmation auprès de la banque, action externe non réalisable avec les outils locaux disponibles; donc issue unsupported et aucun changement du workspace.
